languages.text: Воронка настолько углубилась, что сквозь землю проступил чужеродный металл.

traits.locale_text: Воронка настолько углубилась, что сквозь землю проступил чужеродный металл.

languages.text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.
languages.original_text: Воронка настолько углубилась, что сквозь землю проступил чужеродный металл.

traits.locale_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.
The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.
The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

languages.text: Der Krater ist jetzt so tief, dass du auf seinem Grund ein seltsames Metall schimmern siehst.
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: Der Krater ist jetzt so tief, dass du auf seinem Grund ein seltsames Metall schimmern siehst.

languages.text: 如今的坑洞很深，甚至能看到泥土底下有某种奇怪的金属闪着光。
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: 如今的坑洞很深，甚至能看到泥土底下有某种奇怪的金属闪着光。

languages.text: Le cratère a atteint une telle profondeur que vous discernez maintenant un étrange métal luisant dans les décombres.
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: Le cratère a atteint une telle profondeur que vous discernez maintenant un étrange métal luisant dans les décombres.

languages.text: El cráter es tan profundo que alcanzas a vislumbrar el destello de una peculiar superficie metálica a través de la tierra.
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: El cráter es tan profundo que alcanzas a vislumbrar el destello de una peculiar superficie metálica a través de la tierra.

languages.text: Krater artık o kadar derin ki toprağın arasından parlayan tuhaf metalleri görebiliyorsun.
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: Krater artık o kadar derin ki toprağın arasından parlayan tuhaf metalleri görebiliyorsun.

languages.text: そのクレーターは今やとても深く、土の中から奇妙な金属が輝いているのが見える。
languages.original_text: The crater is now so deep that you can see some strange metal gleaming through the dirt.

traits.locale_text: そのクレーターは今やとても深く、土の中から奇妙な金属が輝いているのが見える。
